questions.question: Describe the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning. Provide an example of each type.
questions.hint: Supervised learning is used for classification and regression tasks, while unsupervised learning is used for clustering and dimensionality reduction.

questions.question: What is the purpose of regularization in neural networks? Explain how it works and provide an example.
questions.hint: Regularization helps prevent overfitting by adding a penalty term to the loss function, which discourages large weights.

questions.question: Compare the concepts of bias-variance tradeoff and overfitting. Provide an example of how to mitigate overfitting.
questions.hint: The bias-variance tradeoff refers to the tradeoff between model complexity and prediction error. Overfitting occurs when a model is too complex and performs well on training data but poorly on test data. To mitigate overfitting, techniques such as regularization and cross-validation can be used.
